channel.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Nov 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Tutorials

Video tutorials

  • Game Development Center - Tutorials about 2D and networked multiplayer game development (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Nov 16th, 2020
item.description:
Games

3D

  • Super Tux Party - A free/libre and open-source party game that is meant to replicate the feel of games such as Mario Party (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Nov 12th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • Godot-Trail-Systemstars110 - Advanced 2D/3D trail system (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Unofficial Godot builds

  • Calinou's builds - Mainly master branch, other branches can be found here.
  • iFire's builds - Distributed via Itch.io (automatic updates with app), master branch only.

    • Other

  • codetranslatorstars21 - Translates GDScript to C# (WIP).
  • gdscript-ppstars55 - Translates GDScript to GDNative C++ (WIP).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Oct 18th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • GodotRxstars32 - Reactive extensions for Godot C# (Godot 3.2 Mono).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • Cartographerstars256 - Heightmap-based 3D terrain editor (Godot 3.2).
  • GDGIFExporterstars24 - GIF exporter made entirely in GDScript (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Sep 26th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • NI mate Motion Capturestars11 - Animate Skeletons with a Microsoft Kinect sensor (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Sep 25th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • Level of Detail (LOD)stars90 - Level of detail add-on for meshes, lights and particles. Can improve performance in large scenes (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Sep 20th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • UI Design Toolstars142 - Intuitive design workflow for UIs in the editor (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Sep 17th, 2020
item.description:
GDScript/C# editor support

  • JetBrains Rider (C#)stars87 - Syntax highlighting, autocompletion and run configurations.

    • Plugins and scripts

  • Godot NExtstars476 - A set of basic node extensions (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Sep 16th, 2020
item.description:
Modules

  • godot-apple-idstars14 - Module for sign in with Apple in Godot (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Aug 28th, 2020
item.description:
GDScript/C# editor support

  • Emacsstars136 - Syntax highlighting, code folding, indentation and autocompletion.
  • Vimstars137 - Syntax highlighting, autocompletion and linting using the LSP server provided by the Godot editor. Also supports the Godot shader language.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Aug 24th, 2020
item.description:
Games

3D

  • Broken Sealsstars122 - A work-in-progress third person action RPG with multiplayer support (Godot 3.2 - needs custom engine modules).

    • Demos

  • The Towerstars2 - A voxel-based parkour game to show the capabilities of the Voxelman module (Godot 3.2).

    • Modules

  • Entity Spell Systemstars35 - An entity and spell system for complex (optionally multiplayer) RPGs (Godot 3.2, 4.0).
  • Texture Packerstars16 - Tools to layer, pack, and merge textures at runtime (Godot 3.2, 4.0).
  • Voxelmanstars28 - A voxel engine with more focus on editor integration, gameplay-related features, and extendability (Godot 3.2, 4.0).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Aug 6th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • Godellostars295 - A Trello-like kanban board application made with Godot. A proof of concept for complex non-game applications with Godot, as well real-time online interactions between multiple users. Includes backend code (Godot 3.2).
  • Material Makerstars957 - Create PBR materials procedurally (similar to Substance Designer) (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Aug 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Modules

  • PortAudiostars8 - Wrapper methods and Godot-friendly types to use PortAudio (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jun 30th, 2020
item.description:
Templates

  • First Person Starterstars89 - Template with First Person Controller, easily adjustable from the Inspector (Godot 3.2).

    • Plugins and scripts

  • MDFrameworkstars36 - A C# multiplayer framework with additional tools (Godot 3.2 Mono).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jun 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Godot script editor syntax themes

  • Godot syntax themesstars151 - 13 syntax themes including Ayu Mirage, Darcula, Gruvbox Dark, Monokai, One Dark, Solarized, and more.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jun 9th, 2020
item.description:
Games

2D

  • spindle of serendipity - Word guessing game with customizable entries (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jun 8th, 2020
item.description:
Games

2D

  • Librerama - A free/libre fast-paced arcade collection of mini-games (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot May 28th, 2020
item.description:
Games

2D

  • Circle Jumpstars98 - Mobile arcade game, addicting and enjoyable. How-to-made tutorial is available, so you can recreate it yourself and learn Godot (Godot 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot May 12th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • InGridstars33 - Infinite scrolling grid (Godot 3.x).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot May 11th, 2020
item.description:
Games

3D

  • Thrivestars953 - A free, open-source game about the evolution of life.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot May 4th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • TileSet Builderstars7 - Quickly build tilesets with style (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Apr 29th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • Qodotstars409 - Quake .map file support for Godot. Lets you use TrenchBroom for level design. (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Apr 21st, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • VPainterstars207 - 3D vertex painting plugin (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Apr 11th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • Volumetricsstars137 - Voxel-based volumetric lighting and fog plugin (Godot 3.2).
  • Yume Visual Novel Editorstars76 - An integrated editor for creating visual novel games (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Apr 6th, 2020
item.description:
Tutorials

Video tutorials

  • HeartBeast - A Godot developer's diary and tutorials (Godot 3.x).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Apr 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • Godot Game Toolsstars193 - Blender plugin to ease importing assets into Godot.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Mar 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Templates

  • Multiplayer First Person Shooterstars30 - Multiplayer first person shooter example project (Godot 3.2).
  • Multiplayer Third Person Shooterstars31 - Multiplayer third person shooter example project (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Mar 16th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • godotccdstars24 - Fast 3D collision checks in Godot using libccd (Godot 3.2, 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Mar 9th, 2020
item.description:
Other

  • godot-gdscript-toolkitstars231 - Independent set of command line tools for working with GDScript - parser, linter and formatter (Godot 3.x).

    • Plugins and scripts

  • godotdetourstars61 - A GDNative implementation of the detour/detourcrowd library (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Feb 28th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • Pixeloramastars1.8k - 2D pixel art editor (Godot 3.2).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Feb 24th, 2020
item.description:
Tutorials

Video tutorials

  • Bitwes's channel - TDD game development and GUT framework tutorials.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Feb 3rd, 2020
item.description:
GDScript/C# editor support

  • IntelliJ IDEAstars84 - Syntax highlighting and autocompletion.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jan 17th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • Godot Mixing Deskstars265 - Make procedural sound and adaptive/procedural music with a few nodes and a couple lines of code (Godot 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jan 9th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • GitHub integrationstars145 - Interact with GitHub without opening your browser (Godot 3.1).

    • Templates

  • Godot-GameTemplatestars454 - Template with all necessary stuff taken care of. Designed for pixel art games (Godot 3.1).

    • Games

    2D

  • SealedBitestars474 - 2D platformer game, winner of the GitHub Game Off 2019 jam (Godot 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jan 8th, 2020
item.description:
Modules

  • GodotSteamstars795 - Steam API library binding for Godot. Supports Windows, macOS and Linux (Godot 3.1).

    • Plugins and scripts

  • GodotNotificationCenterstars44 - A notification center (Godot 3.1).
  • Tiled importerstars505 - Import maps from Tiled (Godot 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jan 5th, 2020
item.description:
Games

2D

  • SuperStarfighterstars175 - Fast-paced local party game with starships that battle in a top-down arena (Godot 3.1).
  • Unknown Horizonsstars286 - Official work-in-progress reimplementation of Unknown Horizons (Godot 3.1).
  • TuxBuilderstars169 - Work-in-progress reimplementation of SuperTux (Godot 3.1).
  • Haldricstars316 - Official work-in-progress reimplementation of Battle for Wesnoth (Godot 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Dec 21st, 2019
item.description:
Demos

  • Open Source A-RPG Demostars698 - RPG demo (Godot 3.0).

    • Other

  • build-godot and build-godot-mono - Scripts that build and run Godot, attempting to install dependencies if needed.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Nov 28th, 2019
item.description:
Demos

  • Realistic Water Shaderstars257 - Realistic 3D water shader with foam and caustics (Godot 3.1).

    • Tutorials

    Text tutorials

  • Godot Recipes - A collection of text tutorials for from beginner to advanced. (Godot 3.x)

    • Plugins and scripts

  • gdstatsstars25 - A library of pseudorandom number generators for common statistical distributions (Godot 3.0).

    • Tutorials

    Video tutorials

  • KidsCanCode - Tutorials about 2D and 3D game development (Godot 2.1, 3.x).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Oct 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Games

3D

  • Rapid Rescuestars52 - Rapid Rescue is a local multiplayer strategy game inspired by Labyrinth (Godot 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Oct 21st, 2019
item.description:
Tutorials

Text tutorials

  • Official Getting Started Guide (Godot 2.1, 3.0, 3.1)
  • Getting Started with Godot by devga.me - A step-by-step introduction (Godot 3.1).
  • Godot Multiplayer Tutorials - Tutorials for creating a client-server multiplayer game. Includes a tutorial for hosting a server on Google Compute Platform (Godot 3.1).

    • Tutorials

    Video tutorials

  • Bastiaan Olij's channel - Tutorials about 3D, shaders, VR and GDNative (Godot 3.x).
  • BornCG's Creating a Simple 3D Game - Tutorial series about creating a 3D game (Godot 3.1).
  • Code with Tom - Learn to code by making games (Godot 3.1).
  • From GM:S to Godot (Godot 3.0)
  • GDquest - Tutorials about 2D and 3D game development (Godot 2.1, 3.x).
  • Making programs with Godot (Godot 3.1)
  • Miziziziz's channel - Tutorials about 3D effects and replicating concepts from well-known games (Godot 3.0).

    • Plugins and scripts

  • Auto Tile Layerstars28 - Allows automatic 2D tiling using RPG Maker's Autotile format (Godot 2.1).
  • CRT Shaderstars239 - Godot shader that simulates CRT displays (Godot 2.1, 3.1).
  • Escoriastars549 - Point & click adventure game framework (Godot 2.1, 3.1).
  • FMOD GDNativestars60 - Plugin to use the FMOD audio engine in GDScript (Godot 3.1)
  • GodotPhoenixChannelsstars137 - A GDScript and Godot Engine implementation for the Channels API of the Phoenix Framework (Godot 3.1).
  • GodotTIEstars233 - Text Interface Engine to control text output (like in a RPG dialogue) (Godot 2.x, 3.x).
  • Grass Pluginstars50 - A plugin to handle huge amounts of grass, foliages and other vegetations (Godot 2.1).
  • gtermstars59 - GUI control that draws something similar to *nix terminal emulators (Godot 2.1).
  • GUTstars708 - Utility for writing unit tests in GDScript (Godot 3.x).
  • Scrolling Backgroundstars15 - A scrolling background node (Godot 2.1).
  • SMRT-Godotstars95 - A dialog system and editor fairly customizable, a nice fit for story-driven games (Godot 3.0).
  • SUTjoystick - Easy gamepad support for GNU/Linux and Windows (Godot 2.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Oct 9th, 2019
item.description:
Demos

  • FPS Teststars56 - A singleplayer FPS test. Physics work, but there are no enemies and no proper shooting (Godot 2.1).
  • Pathfinding 2dstars60 - A demo project demonstrating pathfinding using a tilemap (Godot 2.1).
  • UDP Snapshot interpolationstars53 - Lets you connect to a server and view networked physics (Godot 2.1).
  • UDP State synchronizationstars111 - A more efficient networking demo than the snapshot interpolation one (Godot 2.1).
  • Voxel Gamestars66 - Minecraft-like voxel terrain demo (Godot 2.1).
  • voxelgamestars203 - Minecraft-like voxel terrain demo, utilising the godot_voxel module (Godot 3.1).

    • Games

    2D

  • BlockPopstars24 - A simple Breakout clone (Godot 2.1).
  • Bombsstars14 - Simple mobile game. You need to touch bombs to defuse them (Godot 2.1).
  • Breakablestars51 - A breakout-like game (Godot 3.0).
  • Captain Holetoothstars53 - Explorative platformer in a detailed world. Geared towards younger players (Godot 2.1).
  • Dolphin Island 2stars162 - Platformer game made for the A Game By It's Cover 2015 Game Jam (Godot 2.1).
  • DynaDungeonsstars165 - Bomberman clone in a fantasy universe (Godot 2.1).
  • Kraken-Rampagestars3 - Ludum Dare 33 entry made in 48 hours (Godot 2.1).
  • Memory Gamestars15 - Simple Memory game (Godot 3.0).
  • Minehunterstars12 - A Minesweeper clone (Godot 2.1).
  • Minilens - Free puzzle platform game (Godot 2.1).
  • Mountain of Hopestars10 - Game made on Theater Game Jam (PGA 2015) (Godot 2.1).
  • Ninja-Trainingstars31 - Small running game done as 1 hour challenge (Godot 2.1).
  • No hopestars7 - Ludum Dare 33 entry made in 48 hours (Godot 2.1).
  • Planet Riderstars28 - 2D physics parkour game in an alien environment (Godot 2.1).
  • Platshootstars34 - A 2D shooter game (Godot 2.1).
  • Ringedstars69 - Top-down shooter with extensive usage of light effects (Godot 2.1).
  • Tanks of Freedomstars898 - Free turn-based isometric strategy game (Godot 2.1).
  • Three Hungry Micestars3 - Breakout game with mice made for the Godot Engine Jam of March 2016 (Godot 2.1).

    • Games

    3D

  • Cheese Hunterstars13 - A game for Godot Engine Jam of March 2016 (Godot 2.1).
  • Meteoritestars236 - A lowres metroidvania FPS, inspired by Metroid Prime, made for LOWREZJAM 2018 (Godot 3.0).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jun 30th, 2019
item.description:
Modules

  • FMOD Integrationstars132 - Module to integrate the FMOD audio engine in Godot.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Feb 27th, 2019
item.description:
Games

2D

  • Blipshiftstars11 - Simple top-down moving platforms game (Godot 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Feb 26th, 2019
item.description:
GDScript/C# editor support

  • Kakounestars7 - Syntax highlighting.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Feb 5th, 2019
item.description:
Godot script editor syntax themes

  • base16-godotstars18 - All base16stars7.9k themes.

    • GDScript/C# editor support

  • Atom - Syntax highlighting.
  • Geanystars14 - Syntax highlighting.
  • Geditstars14 - Syntax highlighting.
  • Sublime Textstars60 - Syntax highlighting.

    • Demos

  • OpenRPGstars888 - JRPG-style game demo and template (Godot 3.1).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jan 29th, 2019
item.description:
Other

  • gd-com npm package - Communicate with Godot clients using Node.js.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Dec 6th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

  • RawPackerstars17 - Simple binary packing/unpacking for RawArray.
  • WaterSplash 2D nodestars30
  • godot-anlstars82 - A wrapper for Accidental Noise Librarystars60 with a visual noise editing support.
  • godot-voxelstars904 - Module for creating volumetric worlds in Godot Engine.

    • Other

  • godot-wrapperstars13 - Script that helps Debian and Ubuntu users install and use Godot.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Nov 17th, 2018
item.description:
Other

  • godot-cistars184 - Docker image to export Godot games through CI. Includes GitLab CI script example.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Feb 16th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

  • godot-enet-betterstars70 - A better ENet module for high-performance multiplayer games with Godot.
  • NativeDialogsstars19 - Using native dialogs in Godot.
  • spinestars99 - Spine animation support module.

    • Plugins and scripts

  • Easing Scriptstars37 - A port of the Robert Penner's equations for easing.
  • gdutilsstars76 - Utilities for Godot written in GDScript.

    • Godot script editor syntax themes

  • Syntax themes by Geequlim - Chester, Google Code Light and Monokai.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Nov 28th, 2017
item.description:
Modules

  • godot-pythonstars975 - Python support for Godot 3.
  • Gdnet for Godot 3stars92 - An ENet wrapper for Godot 3.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Oct 23rd, 2017
item.description:
Plugins and scripts

  • Camera2D Screen Shake - Screen shake effect for Camera2D.

    • Other

  • godot.sh - Script that automatically downloads and launches latest version of Godot, or compiles and launches the Git master branch.

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Feb 14th, 2017
item.description:
GDScript/C# editor support

  • Visual Studio Code - Comes with a wealth of features to make your programming experience as comfortable as possible.
    • godot-tools Visual Studio Code Extension - A complete set of tools to code games with Godot Engine in Visual Studio Code.
    • C# Tools for Godot Visual Studio Code Extension - Debugger and utilities for working with Godot C# projects in VSCode.
    • GUT Visual Studio Code Extensionstars7 - Run GUT framework unit/integration tests directly from the Visual Studio Code Editors.
    • gdformat Visual Studio Code Extension - Formatter for GDScript in Visual Studio Code (Godot 3.x).

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Jun 7th, 2016
item.description:
Modules

  • Open Adaptive Music Librarystars42

item.title: Calinou/awesome-godot Nov 1st, 2015
item.description:
Modules

  • Head tracking using OpenCVstars31

    • Plugins and scripts

  • Polygon Mergestars11 - Merge polygons.
  • Simplex 2D/3Dstars22 - Simplex deterministic noise functions.
  • Tileset Builder - Build tilesets.

    • Other

  • replicate-file.sh - Script to update copies of a file with one master file.
  • strip-to-frames.pl - Perl script to split a grid spritesheet image into numbered individual frame files.
